candidate_definitions.text: Implementation of ICCV19 Paper "Learning Two-View Correspondences and Geometry Using Order-Aware Network"

Pytorch implementation of OANet for ICCV'19 paper ["Learning Two-View Correspondences and Geometry Using Order-Aware Network"](https://arxiv.org/abs/1908.04964), by Jiahui Zhang, Dawei Sun, Zixin Luo, Anbang Yao, Lei Zhou, Tianwei Shen, Yurong Chen, Long Quan and Hongen Liao.

candidate_glosses.text: Pytorch implementation of OANet for ICCV'19 paper ["Learning Two-View Correspondences and Geometry Using Order-Aware Network"](https://arxiv.org/abs/1908.04964), by Jiahui Zhang, Dawei Sun, Zixin Luo, Anbang Yao, Lei Zhou, Tianwei Shen, Yurong Chen, Long Quan and Hongen Liao.
